overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage following a character walking through a foggy, neon-lit Night City street. The journey begins near Tom's Diner, progresses toward a massive corporate tower, and continues through industrial zones toward a burning warehouse, capturing the dystopian atmosphere with wet reflective streets and holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with diner and neon signage

events.description: black SUV drives past from left to right across the crosswalk
character turns right onto the sidewalk passing Tom's Diner

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet city street approaching the crosswalk, then turning onto the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: black SUV driving across the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: large concrete overpass structure spanning the street with metal supports
corner building with circular neon sign reading 'Tom's Diner' in pink and white
tall vertical yellow neon sign with Japanese katakana characters
tall street lamp emitting distinctive red colored light

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy cyberpunk street with an elevated metro track overhead. The character walks past a crosswalk where an SUV drives by, then turns onto the sidewalk passing Tom's Diner with its prominent circular neon sign. The wet asphalt reflects the red street lamps and colorful neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense commercial corridor approaching corporate tower

events.description: crowd density increases as approaching the mega tower, more pedestrians visible ahead
passing under a green tinted street lamp creating colored light on the pavement

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk toward the massive corporate tower, moving with the flow of pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of three pedestrians walking ahead in the same direction toward the tower

entered.detail: massive skyscraper dominating the skyline with illuminated corporate logo near the top
multi-story buildings with illuminated windows and storefronts

segments.scene_description: Walking along the sidewalk away from Tom's Diner, the massive corporate tower looms ahead through the fog. The crowd density increases with more pedestrians walking in the same direction. The character passes colorful storefronts on the left and the vertical katakana sign grows larger on the right.

events.description: turns right at intersection to cross the street, moving from sidewalk to crosswalk
traffic light changes from red to green, vehicles begin to move
looks up at the mega tower while crossing, then continues straight

agents.ego_description: turning right at the intersection and crossing the street with other pedestrians, glancing up at the tower

notable_agents.action: sedan waiting at the red light, then proceeding through the intersection

entered.detail: zebra crossing markings on the wet asphalt with traffic lights
large dark industrial structure with minimal windows and corrugated metal facade
orange illuminated street sign with white text
wooden utility poles with multiple crossbars and hanging wires

segments.scene_description: The character turns right at a major intersection, crossing the street as the traffic light changes. The mega tower shifts to the left as the perspective changes. An orange street sign marks the location as Konpeki Plaza. Industrial buildings appear on the right while the character glances up at the towering skyscraper.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional industrial corridor with palm trees

events.description: crowd density decreases significantly, street becomes less busy with fewer pedestrians
distant orange glow from fire becomes visible through the fog ahead

agents.ego_description: walking down a less crowded street lined with palm trees, approaching an industrial area with visible smoke ahead

entered.detail: tropical palm trees lining the right side of the street
raised highway structure running parallel to the street on the left
dark smoke rising into the foggy sky from a distant fire

segments.scene_description: Moving through a transitional zone with fewer pedestrians, the street is lined with palm trees and industrial warehouses. The mega tower fades into the fog behind while dark smoke plumes become visible ahead. The atmosphere shifts from dense commercial to industrial with overhead power lines and elevated highways.

events.description: approaching a large industrial building with active fire and intense orange flames visible
passing the burning warehouse, moving from intense orange light back to cooler foggy atmosphere

agents.ego_description: walking toward and then past a burning industrial warehouse, observing the fire and smoke

notable_agents.action: pedestrian running past the camera toward the burning building area

entered.detail: large warehouse building engulfed in flames with intense orange glow and thick black smoke
red and white striped construction barricades along the left sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a dramatic scene of a burning industrial warehouse with intense orange flames illuminating the fog. After passing red and white barricades, the character walks past the fire, which casts dynamic orange light on the wet pavement. The segment ends as the burning building recedes into the background and the street continues into the hazy distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a foggy, neon-lit urban corridor that transitions from a commercial street into a towering corporate district. It begins on a wet cyberpunk street beneath an elevated metro track, moving past a crosswalk and the glowing circular neon sign of Tom's Diner as red street lamps reflect off the asphalt. As the camera advances along the sidewalk, the fog partially reveals a massive corporate tower looming ahead while the crowd of pedestrians thickens and colorful storefronts blur past. The scene then shifts at a major intersection where the character crosses the street, causing the mega tower to slide to the left of the frame. Finally, the perspective opens up to reveal an orange Konpeki Plaza sign and industrial buildings on the right, ending with a glance up at the overwhelming scale of the skyscraper.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a transitional industrial zone that culminates in the encounter with a massive structural fire. It begins by moving past palm trees and warehouses as the distant mega tower fades into the fog and dark smoke plumes emerge on the horizon. As the environment shifts from a commercial feel to an industrial landscape, the camera glides under overhead power lines and elevated highways. The scene then opens onto a dramatic sight of a burning warehouse, where the camera passes red and white barricades while intense orange flames illuminate the surrounding fog and wet pavement. Finally, the burning building recedes into the background as the camera continues forward into the hazy distance of the street.
